1922.one_line_summary: Standard interface for zk-SNARK verifier contracts.
1922.notes: Defines generic verify() interface for elliptic curve pairing verification; designed for private transactions and scaling.

1923.one_line_summary: Registry for zk-SNARK verification activity and verifier contracts.
1923.notes: Enables registration and attestation of proofs; complements ERC-1922.

1948.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension allowing dynamic bytes32 data storage per token.
1948.notes: Addresses use cases like cross-chain tokens and evolving metadata; extends read/write data functions.

1967.one_line_summary: Standard storage slots for proxy contract metadata (implementation, admin, beacon).
1967.notes: Enables block explorers and tools to extract proxy info; addresses storage collision risks with compiler-allocated slots.

1973.one_line_summary: Scalable per-block token reward distribution using round masks and participant masks.
1973.notes: Solves gas limit problem for rewards across tens of thousands of participants; uses pull-based system.

1996.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension enabling holds/escrows on token balances with notary-based release.
1996.notes: Guarantees future transfer; supports partial execution and perpetual holds; addresses KYC/AML use cases.

2009.one_line_summary: Decentralized compliance service for checking transfer/mint/burn permissions on regulated tokens.
2009.notes: Generic implementation; supports multiple tokens; maintains accumulated compliance state.

2018.one_line_summary: Extends ERC-1996 with clearing process for off-chain regulatory checks before transfer.
2018.notes: Two-step transfer with clearing agent decision; complements holds for regulated transfers.

2019.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension for token wallet funding requests with operator authorization.
2019.notes: Enables decentralized fund request workflow with instructions for payment routing; operator-driven execution.

2020.one_line_summary: Unified regulated e-money token combining compliance, holds, clearing, funding, and payouts.
2020.notes: Integrates ERC-1996, ERC-2018, ERC-2019, ERC-2021 for fully compliant digital currency issuance.

2021.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension enabling token payout/withdrawal requests with operator authorization.
2021.notes: Complements funding; supports partial fund placement in suspense before final execution/rejection.

2098.one_line_summary: Compact secp256k1 signature encoding reducing 65 bytes to 64 by embedding yParity in s.
2098.notes: Saves gas and transaction size; yParity hijacks top bit of s; imminent for meta-transactions.

2135.one_line_summary: Interface for consumable assets (e.g., tickets) extending ERC-721/ERC-1155.
2135.notes: Enables consumption via consume() function; emits transfer to zero address on consumption; use-case agnostic.

2157.one_line_summary: Standardized storage contract ABI for dType instances enabling deterministic data addressability.
2157.notes: Separates data from logic; CRUD pattern; enables type-specific data retrieval on-chain.

2193.one_line_summary: Human-readable resource identifiers for dType data using semantic separators (./@/#//).
2193.notes: Addresses any on-chain resource type; signature-based ownership verification; prevents replay attacks.
